item.title: Optimize LinkedIn Headlines for Discovery 🔍 • Identify your industry keywords. • Use: “I help X achieve Y using Z.” • Highlight your unique selling point. • Keep it under 120 characters. • Include a relevant emoji for personality. What keywords will make you more discoverable to recruiters? #linkedin #personalbranding #ScalePilot #SocialPilot #AIAutomations
item.description: Optimize LinkedIn Headlines for Discovery 🔍 • Identify your industry keywords. • Use: “I help X achieve Y using Z.” • Highlight your unique selling point. • Keep it under 120 characters. • Include a relevant emoji for personality. What keywords will make you more discoverable to recruiters? #linkedin #personalbranding #ScalePilot #SocialPilot #AIAutomations
